description_long: This coupe car features a compact, aerodynamic body with a smooth, rounded front fascia and a gently sloping roofline. The exterior is predominantly white, accented by blue side trim and pink window frames, giving it a distinctive and modern appearance. The car has four doors, with flush handles and slightly tinted windows, and is equipped with standard-sized wheels and a visible antenna on the roof. The front grille is minimalistic, with subtle air intakes and integrated headlights, while the rear is clean with simple taillights and a small trunk. The side mirrors are streamlined, and the overall design suggests a focus on urban maneuverability and efficiency. The materials appear to be primarily painted metal, glass, and rubber, typical of contemporary private vehicles.
description: A compact, white coupe car with blue and pink accents, four doors, and a sleek, aerodynamic design. Features include tinted windows, a roof antenna, and minimalistic front and rear styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded hood, minimal grille, and integrated headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue side trim, pink window frames, and roof antenna.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the simple taillights, trunk, and rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible blue trim and pink window frames.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with two side windows per side
